name: GamaLife - Companhia de Seguros de Vida, S.A.
summary: GamaLife - Companhia de Seguros de Vida, S.A. provides insurance and reinsurance products. The company was formerly known as GNB - Companhia de Seguros de Vida, S.A. and changed its name to GamaLife - Companhia de Seguros de Vida, S.A. in March 2020. GamaLife - Companhia de Seguros de Vida, S.A. was founded in 1993 and is based in Lisbon, Portugal.
